title: 11 structures razed to the ground in Thembalethu
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS -  No injuries were reported after a fire destroyed 11 structures in Thembalethu earlier today, Sunday 3 November.

"No one was injured. The people are safe," assured Ward 9 Councillor Thembinkosi Ernest Lento following a fire in Zone 7.

The fire broke out at about 15:00.

According to Lento, who was present at the scene, the fire brigade began leaving around 18:20 when the fire was under control.


> At least 37 people, including 14 children, were affected by the fire. The remaining victims consist of nine men and 14 women.


Anyone able to provide assistance to the affected families can contact Lento on 083 675 0579.

At least 37 people were affected by the fire.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
